title: Legit Elytra Swap
description: Legit Elytra Swap is a client-side utility mod that automates the hotkey-less swapping between chestplates and elytras in a "legit" and visually consistent manner.
body:
## ✨ Features
> 
> **Strict Double Jump Detection:** The mod activates only when you press the jump key a second time while in mid-air (Double Jump). The logic has been refined to prevent accidental activations when jumping from the ground.
> 
> **Smart Elytra Swap:** Upon detecting a double jump, the mod automatically searches for an Elytra in your hotbar (slots 1-9) and equips it instantly.
> 
> **Automatic Landing Detection:** When you touch the ground, the mod detects the transition and automatically re-equips the best chestplate available in your hotbar.
> 
> **Intelligent Chestplate Prioritization:** Includes a smart scoring system that prioritizes materials (Netherite > Diamond > Iron...), durability, and enchantments to ensure you always equip the strongest available protection.
> 
> **Full Visibility (No Silent Swap):** Unlike other utility mods, this one performs a visible swap:
> Physically changes the hotbar slot.
> Triggers a hand swing animation (swingHand).
> Holds the item in hand before restoring the original slot, ensuring both you and others on a server see the equipment change.
> 
> **Total Control:** Includes a toggle key (Default: K) to quickly enable or disable the mod, with notifications.

## ⚙️ Technical Details
> 
> Version: Minecraft 1.21.8 (Compatible with Fabric 0.18.4).
> 
> Optimization: Uses Fabric Access Wideners to interact directly with the player inventory efficiently, removing the need for reflection and improving stability.
> 
> Architecture: Client-side only.

##  ⚠️ Disclaimer
### IMPORTANT: Using this mod on multiplayer servers is at your own risk.
> 
> **This mod automates inventory actions and sends network packets (UpdateSelectedSlotC2SPacket) to the server.
> Some anti-cheat systems may interpret these rapid actions as an unfair advantage or automated behavior ("Macros").
> The author and developers are NOT responsible for any bans, penalties, or kicks you may receive on any Minecraft server for using this mod.
> Always consult server rules before using utility mods.**
>
